entries.source: Talk To Historical Figures With AI is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Step into conversation with a historical figure. Ask questions, challenge ideas, and hear the world through their era, values, and limits.
entries.value: Talk don na tarihi Figures tare da AI hanya ce mai mayar da hankali ta amfani da AI don koyo maimakon tara amsoshi kawai. An gina yanayin a kan aiki takamaimai: Mataki zuwa conversation tare da a na tarihi mutum. tambaya tambayoyi, ƙalubalanci ideas, da hear the duniya ta hanyar nasu zamani, values, da limits.

entries.source: Talk To Historical Figures With AI: practical guide
entries.value: Talk don na tarihi Figures tare da AI: jagora mai amfani

entries.source: Talking to a historical figure is not magic access to the past. It is a learning format.
entries.value: Talking don a na tarihi mutum ba magic samun dama don the past. Shi ne a learning format.

entries.source: Teachers and leaders can start with Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards before a formal rollout.
entries.value: Malamai da leaders can fara tare da koyi Anything, Socratic Instruction, aikin gida koci, tambayoyi, da katunan tunatarwa kafin a formal fara amfani.

entries.source: Teachers need more than a generic chatbot. They need predictable learning behaviors: ask questions, check reasoning, generate practice, preserve student voice, and make misconceptions visible.
entries.value: Malamai buƙata fiye da a generic chatbot. su buƙata predictable learning behaviors: tambaya tambayoyi, bincika tunani, samar atisaye, preserve dalibi voice, da sa rashin fahimta visible.

entries.source: Teachers or parents evaluating focused AI learning behaviors before a school deployment.

entries.source: Thank you for choosing to be part of our community at Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ), doing business as inspir ("inspir", "we", "us", "our"). We are committed to protecting your personal information and your right to privacy. If you have any questions or concerns about this privacy notice or our practices concerning your personal information, please contact us at support@inspir.app. When you visit our website https://web.archive.org/web/20221016155759/https://www.inspir.app, use our mobile applications, as the case may be (the "App") and more generally, use any of our services (the "Services", which include the Website and App), we appreciate that you are trusting us with your personal information. We take your privacy very seriously. In this privacy notice, we seek to explain to you in the clearest way possible what information we collect, how we use it and what rights you have in relation to it. We hope you take some time to read through it carefully, as it is important. If there are any terms in this privacy notice that you disagree with, please discontinue the use of our Services immediately. This privacy notice applies to all information collected through our Services (which, as described above, includes our Website and App), as well as, any related services, sales, marketing or events. Please read this privacy notice carefully as it will help you understand what we do with the information that we collect. Our Terms and Conditions govern all use of our Service and together with the Privacy Policy constitute your agreement with us (“Agreement”).
entries.value: Thank kai don zaɓar don be part na namu community at Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ), doing business as inspir ("inspir", "mu", "mu", "namu"). mu suna committed don protecting naka bayanan sirri da naka daidai don privacy. If kai have any tambayoyi ko concerns game da this privacy sanarwa ko namu practices concerning naka bayanan sirri, please contact mu at support@inspir.app. lokacin da kai visit namu website https://web.archive.org/web/20221016155759/https://www.inspir.app, amfani da namu mobile applications, as the case na iya be (the "manhaja") da ƙarin generally, amfani da any na namu services (the "Services", wacce haɗa the Website da manhaja), mu appreciate that kai suna trusting mu tare da naka bayanan sirri. mu take naka privacy very seriously. a cikin this privacy sanarwa, mu seek don bayyana don kai a cikin the clearest way possible abin da information mu collect, yadda mu amfani da it da abin da haƙƙoƙi kai have a cikin relation don it. mu hope kai take some lokaci don karanta ta hanyar it carefully, as Shi ne important. If there suna any terms a cikin this privacy sanarwa that kai disagree tare da, please discontinue the amfani da na namu Services immediately. Wannan privacy sanarwa applies don all information collected ta hanyar namu Services (wacce, as described above, includes namu Website da manhaja), as well as, any mai alaƙa services, sales, marketing ko events. Please karanta this privacy sanarwa carefully as it zai taimako kai fahimci abin da mu do tare da the information that mu collect. namu Terms da Conditions govern all amfani da na namu Service da together tare da the manufar sirri constitute naka yarjejeniya tare da mu (“yarjejeniya”).

entries.source: That combination is more useful than either layer alone. A plain encyclopedia summary can be forgettable. Pure roleplay can be misleading. Voice plus evidence creates a better learning surface.
entries.value: Wannan combination shi ne ƙarin mai amfani fiye da either layer alone. Wani plain encyclopedia taƙaitawa can be forgettable. Pure wasan kwaikwayo can be misleading. Voice plus shaida creates a mafi kyau learning surface.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Wannan difference shows up a cikin the flow. maimakon one giant response, the mafi kyau sessions move ta hanyar a madauki: saita a goal, gwada something, get martani, gyara the wurin rauni, da zaɓi the na gaba action.

entries.source: That does not replace teachers, communities, books, or schools. It gives learners another route in. It can help a student start homework, a parent explain a concept, a self-taught builder learn code, or a curious person follow a question that might otherwise disappear.
entries.value: Wannan ba ya replace malamai, communities, books, ko makarantu. It gives masu koyo another hanya a cikin. It zai iya taimakawa a dalibi fara aikin gida, a uba ko uwa bayyana a ra’ayi, a self-taught mai gina koyi lamba, ko a curious person follow a tambaya that might otherwise disappear.

entries.source: That final recap is important. When you explain the idea back, you reveal what is solid and what is still borrowed from the AI.
entries.value: Wannan final recap shi ne important. lokacin da kai bayyana the ra’ayi back, kai reveal abin da shi ne solid da abin da shi ne still borrowed daga the AI.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Wannan mayar da hankali yana da muhimmanci. Wani general chatbot can amsa almost anything, amma a yanayin koyo gives the conversation a siffa. It nudges kai toward the kind na thinking, atisaye, martani, ko exploration that helps the ra’ayi stick.

entries.source: That gap is why an AI learning companion matters. A good companion does more than answer a question. It helps a learner choose a starting point, explains the idea in plain language, checks whether it made sense, and keeps going when the first explanation does not land.
entries.value: Wannan gap shi ne me ya sa an AI abokin koyo yana da muhimmanci. Wani good companion does fiye da amsa a tambaya. It helps a mai koyo zaɓi a farawa point, explains the ra’ayi a cikin plain harshe, bincike whether it made sense, da keeps going lokacin da the farko explanation ba ya land.

entries.source: That hint helps the learner start without removing the act of remembering. inspir's Flashcard Builder is designed for this reveal-and-rate loop: try first, reveal second, rate honestly, then bring weak cards back sooner.
entries.value: Wannan alama helps the mai koyo fara ba tare da removing the act na remembering. inspir's katin tunatarwa mai gina shi ne designed don this reveal-da-kimanta madauki: gwada farko, reveal second, kimanta da gaskiya, sannan bring weak katuna back sooner.

entries.source: That is a warning sign. Recognition is not recall. Reading a clear explanation is not the same as being able to solve a new problem, write a paragraph, or answer a question under pressure.
entries.value: Wannan shi ne a warning sign. karramawa ba tunawa. karatu a bayyananne explanation ba the same as being able don warware a sabo problem, write a paragraph, ko amsa a tambaya under pressure.

entries.source: That is especially important for homework. The useful question is not "Can AI produce the answer?" It usually can. The useful question is "Can AI help the learner understand the path to the answer?" That is why the guide on studying with AI without cheating yourself focuses on hints, checks, and transfer practice.
entries.value: Wannan shi ne especially important don aikin gida. mai amfani tambaya ba "Can AI produce the amsa?" It usually can. mai amfani tambaya shi ne "Can AI taimako the mai koyo fahimci the path don the amsa?" Wannan shi ne me ya sa the jagora a kan studying tare da AI ba tare da cheating yourself focuses a kan alamomi, bincike, da transfer atisaye.

entries.source: That is how inspir approaches historical conversation: a persona card, an in-character reply, and context notes that keep imagination connected to evidence.
entries.value: Wannan shi ne yadda inspir approaches na tarihi conversation: a persona card, an a cikin-character reply, da mahaɗi bayanai that keep imagination connected don shaida.

entries.source: That is the standard inspir is aiming for: learning that feels accessible, personal, playful, and useful for anyone with curiosity and an internet connection.
entries.value: Wannan shi ne the standard inspir shi ne aiming don: learning that feels accessible, sirri, playful, da mai amfani don anyone tare da sha’awar sani da an internet connection.

entries.source: That is the strength of Socratic learning. Instead of handing over the full answer immediately, the tutor asks a focused question. The learner makes a guess. The tutor tests that guess, offers a hint, and helps the learner notice what changed.
entries.value: Wannan shi ne the strength na Socratic learning. maimakon handing over the cikakke amsa immediately, the malami asks a mai mayar da hankali tambaya. mai koyo makes a guess. malami tests that guess, offers a alama, da helps the mai koyo sanarwa abin da changed.

entries.source: That is what inspir's Socratic Instruction mode is built for: one question at a time, with hints before answers and synthesis after genuine thinking.
entries.value: Wannan shi ne abin da inspir's Socratic Instruction mode shi ne an gina don: one tambaya at a lokaci, tare da alamomi kafin amsoshi da synthesis bayan genuine thinking.

entries.source: That is why a Socratic AI tutor can feel slower at first and more powerful later. It trades the comfort of a finished explanation for the evidence that the learner is actually building the idea.
entries.value: Wannan shi ne me ya sa a Socratic malamin AI can feel slower at farko da ƙarin powerful daga baya. It trades the comfort na a finished explanation don the shaida that the mai koyo shi ne actually building the ra’ayi.

entries.source: That is why active recall matters. Instead of looking at the answer, you try to pull it from memory. The effort strengthens the memory and reveals what still needs work.
entries.value: Wannan shi ne me ya sa tunawa mai aiki yana da muhimmanci. maimakon looking at the amsa, kai gwada don pull it daga ƙwaƙwalwa. effort strengthens the ƙwaƙwalwa da reveals abin da still yana buƙatar work.

entries.source: That is why inspir separates learning jobs into public modes. If you want a gentle explanation, start with Learn Anything. If you want to reason through a concept instead of being lectured, use Socratic Instruction. If you are stuck on an assignment, Homework Coach is a better fit than a generic answer engine. The format should serve the learning job.
entries.value: Wannan shi ne me ya sa inspir separates ayyukan koyo zuwa na jama’a modes. If kai want a gentle explanation, fara tare da koyi Anything. If kai want don reason ta hanyar a ra’ayi maimakon being lectured, amfani da Socratic Instruction. If kai suna stuck a kan an aiki, aikin gida koci shi ne a mafi kyau fit fiye da a generic amsa engine. format ya kamata serve the aikin koyo.

entries.source: That kind of questioning turns history from a list into a context.
entries.value: Wannan kind na questioning turns tarihi daga a list zuwa a mahaɗi.

entries.source: That loop appears across the platform. Math Step Coach breaks a problem into steps. Flashcard Builder turns notes into recall practice. Quiz Me On Trivia adds pressure-tested retrieval. Writing Coach helps improve a draft without replacing the writer.
entries.value: Wannan madauki appears across the dandali. lissafi mataki koci breaks a problem zuwa matakai. katin tunatarwa mai gina turns bayanai zuwa tunawa atisaye. tambayoyi Me a kan Trivia adds pressure-tested retrieval. rubutu koci helps inganta a daftari ba tare da replacing the writer.

entries.source: That loop is slower than copying, but it is much faster than staying confused.
entries.value: Wannan madauki shi ne slower fiye da copying, amma Shi ne much sauri fiye da staying confused.

entries.source: That rhythm is especially useful for abstract topics: opportunity cost, causation in history, literary interpretation, ethical tradeoffs, proof, probability, and argument structure. It can also support practical work. A learner can use Debate Any Topic after a Socratic session to test whether their reasoning survives pressure.
entries.value: Wannan rhythm shi ne especially mai amfani don abstract batutuwa: opportunity cost, causation a cikin tarihi, literary interpretation, ethical tradeoffs, proof, probability, da hujja structure. It can also tallafi mai amfani work. Wani mai koyo za su iya amfani da muhawara Any batu bayan a Socratic zama don gwada whether nasu tunani survives pressure.

entries.source: The AI should separate character from evidence. It can answer in a historically grounded voice, but it should also add notes when records are incomplete, interpretations differ, or the response is a reconstruction.
entries.value: AI ya kamata separate character daga shaida. It can amsa a cikin a historically grounded voice, amma it ya kamata also add bayanai lokacin da records suna incomplete, interpretations differ, ko the response shi ne a reconstruction.

entries.source: The app is organized around teaching behaviors such as Socratic questioning, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, roleplay, and planning.
entries.value: Manhaja shi ne organized a kusa da teaching behaviors such as Socratic questioning, aikin gida alamomi, tambayoyi, katunan tunatarwa, wasan kwaikwayo, da tsarawa.

entries.source: The app separates in-character conversation from short context notes about records and uncertainty.
entries.value: Manhajar tana raba tattaunawar da aka yi a matsayin halayen mutumin da bayanan mahallin gajere game da tarihin da ba a tabbatar da su ba.

entries.source: The article is only the starting point. These public routes connect the idea to a live mode, subject hub, study path, or workflow.
entries.value: Kasida shi ne only the farawa point. Waɗannan na jama’a hanyoyi connect the ra’ayi don a yanayi kai tsaye, cibiyar fanni, karatu path, ko tsarin aiki.

entries.source: The audience pages make the expected learning behavior explicit so the first session starts with better judgment.
entries.value: Masu amfani shafuka sa the expected learning hali explicit don haka the farko zama starts tare da mafi kyau judgment.

entries.source: The audience searches this hub is built to answer.
entries.value: Masu amfani searches this cibiya shi ne an gina don amsa.

entries.source: The best AI learning sessions are not one long answer. They look more like a loop:
entries.value: Mafi kyau koyon AI sessions ba su one long amsa. su look ƙarin like a madauki:

entries.source: The best homework help reduces friction without removing the student's responsibility to reason, explain, and revise.
entries.value: Mafi kyau aikin gida taimako reduces friction ba tare da removing the dalibi's responsibility don reason, bayyana, da sake duba.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. Cards ask one thing at a time and include traps so review builds understanding, not just recognition.
entries.value: Mafi kyau learning sessions suna adjustable. katuna tambaya one thing at a lokaci da haɗa traps don haka bita builds fahimta, ba kawai karramawa.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. Instead of dropping a long answer, inspir helps you choose a simpler foundation, a deeper route, or a practical example.
entries.value: Mafi kyau learning sessions suna adjustable. maimakon dropping a long amsa, inspir helps kai zaɓi a simpler foundation, a zurfafa hanya, ko a mai amfani example.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The coach gives targeted revision priorities and before-after examples without replacing your voice.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The journey stays anchored in state and evidence: what is known, what is reconstructed, what is speculative, and what your identity can realistically access.

entries.source: The best outcome is not a perfect answer. It is the moment a learner says, "I think I get it now. Let me try."
entries.value: Mafi kyau outcome ba a perfect amsa. Shi ne the moment a mai koyo says, "I think I get it now. Let me gwada."

entries.source: The better use is feedback, structure, evidence checks, and revision coaching. You can ask it to preserve your voice and avoid replacing the work.
entries.value: Mafi kyau amfani da shi ne martani, structure, shaida bincike, da bita coaching. kai can tambaya it don preserve naka voice da guji replacing the work.

entries.source: The blog connects useful learning advice to live practice, so a guide can become a study session in one step.
entries.value: Blog din yana hada shawarar koyo mai amfani da atisaye mai rai, don jagora ya zama zaman karatu a mataki daya.

entries.source: The blog is organized around pillar clusters, category hubs, related modes, prompt routes, structured data, and an AI-readable index so each guide can be understood and recommended in context.
entries.value: An tsara blog din a kusa da gungun ginshikai, cibiyoyin rukuni, yanayi masu alaka, hanyoyin prompt, bayanai masu tsari, da index mai karantawa ta AI don a fahimci kowane jagora kuma a ba da shawara kansa cikin mahalli.

entries.source: The blog is organized around study methods, prompt loops, and the public AI learning modes people can use immediately.
entries.value: Blog shi ne organized a kusa da karatu methods, madaukai na saƙo, da the na jama’a yanayoyin koyo na AI people za su iya amfani da immediately.

entries.source: The blog should not be a dead end. Every cluster is designed to move a learner from advice into a mode, prompt loop, quiz, flashcard set, or revision habit.
entries.value: Blog bai kamata ya be a dead end. kowane cluster an tsara shi don move a mai koyo daga advice zuwa a mode, madaukin saƙo, tambayoyi, katin tunatarwa saita, ko bita dabi’a.

entries.source: The blog supports the path with prompts, study strategy, and examples that link back into live modes.
entries.value: Blog supports the path tare da saƙonni, karatu strategy, da examples that haɗi back zuwa yanayoyi kai tsaye.

entries.source: The broader open-source inspir platform.
entries.value: Babban dandalin inspir na open-source.

entries.source: The builder balances ambition with review, practice, recovery days, and the next smallest useful action.
entries.value: Mai tsara shirin yana daidaita buri tare da maimaitawa, motsa jiki, kwanakin hutawa, da kuma mataki na gaba mafi ƙanƙanta da ke da amfani.

entries.source: The categories of personal information we have collected about you. he categories of sources from which we collect your personal information. The business or commercial purpose for collecting or selling your personal information. The categories of third parties with whom we share personal information. The specific pieces of personal information we have collected about you. A list of categories of personal information that we have sold, along with the category of any other company we sold it to. If we have not sold your personal information, we will inform you of that fact. A list of categories of personal information that we have disclosed for a business purpose, along with the category of any other company we shared it with. Please note, you are entitled to ask us to provide you with this information up to two times in a rolling twelve-month period. When you make this request, the information provided may be limited to the personal information we collected about you in the previous 12 months.
entries.value: Rukuni-rukuni na bayanan sirri mu have collected game da kai. he rukuni-rukuni na tushe-tushe daga wacce mu collect naka bayanan sirri. business ko commercial purpose don collecting ko selling naka bayanan sirri. rukuni-rukuni na third parties tare da whom mu raba bayanan sirri. specific pieces na bayanan sirri mu have collected game da kai. Wani list na rukuni-rukuni na bayanan sirri that mu have sold, along tare da the rukuni na any other company mu sold it don. If mu have not sold naka bayanan sirri, mu zai inform kai na that gaskiya. Wani list na rukuni-rukuni na bayanan sirri that mu have disclosed don a business purpose, along tare da the rukuni na any other company mu shared it tare da. Please bayani, kai suna entitled don tambaya mu don provide kai tare da this information up don two times a cikin a rolling twelve-month period. lokacin da kai sa this request, the information provided na iya be limited don the bayanan sirri mu collected game da kai a cikin the previous 12 months.

entries.source: The closing beat returns to the mission: public access, schools, and a more open way to learn.
entries.value: Bugun karshe yana komawa ga manufa: samun damar jama'a, makarantu, da hanya mafi bude ta koyo.

entries.source: The coach checks each move, names the rule, and repairs slips before moving forward.
entries.value: Koci bincike each move, names the rule, da repairs slips kafin moving forward.

entries.source: The coach gives targeted revision priorities and before-after examples without replacing your voice.
entries.value: Kocin yana ba da fifikon bita da aka yi niyya da misalan kafin-da-bayan ba tare da maye gurbin muryarka ba.

entries.source: The coach pushes one strong counterargument at a time and tracks the claims that matter.
entries.value: Kocin yana ba da hujja daya mai karfi a kowane lokaci kuma yana bin diddigin hujjojin da suke da muhimmanci.

entries.source: The coach supports your thinking without taking over the assignment, so the final work stays yours.
entries.value: Kocin yana goyon bayan tunaninka ba tare da karbar aikin ba, don haka aikin karshe ya kasance naka.

entries.source: The coach turns misses and hesitation into a review schedule rather than another passive summary.
entries.value: Kocin yana mai da kurakurai da jinkiri zuwa jadawalin bita maimakon wani taƙaitaccen bayani na wucewa.

entries.source: The coding route connects code tutoring, project coaching, data interpretation, research, and concept mapping so learning happens through small testable steps.
entries.value: Rubuta lamba hanya connects lamba tutoring, aiki coaching, fassarar bayanai, bincike, da ra’ayi mapping don haka learning happens ta hanyar small testable matakai.

entries.source: The common idea is simple: keep the learner active. AI should make thinking easier to start, not unnecessary to do.
entries.value: Na kowa ra’ayi shi ne mai sauƙi: keep the mai koyo mai aiki. AI ya kamata sa thinking easier don fara, not unnecessary don do.

entries.source: The community expanded through schools, universities, competitions, extracurricular programmes, and learner communities.
entries.value: Community expanded ta hanyar makarantu, universities, competitions, extracurricular programmes, da mai koyo communities.

entries.source: The comparison searches this hub is built to answer.
entries.value: Kwatanci searches this cibiya shi ne an gina don amsa.

entries.source: The copy trap is subtle. It does not always feel like cheating. Sometimes it feels like being efficient. The AI explains something beautifully, you nod along, and then you move on. Ten minutes later you cannot reproduce the idea without the answer in front of you.
entries.value: Tarkon kwafe shi ne subtle. It ba ya always feel like cheating. Sometimes it feels like being efficient. AI explains something beautifully, kai nod along, da sannan kai move a kan. Ten mintuna daga baya kai cannot reproduce the ra’ayi ba tare da the amsa a cikin front na kai.

entries.source: The current inspirlearning.com rebuild.
entries.value: Sake gina inspirlearning.com na yanzu.

entries.source: The debate uses public style and worldview without pretending to know private beliefs.
entries.value: Muhawarar tana amfani da salon magana da ra'ayin jama'a ba tare da yin ikirarin sanin sirrin imanin mutum ba.

entries.source: The difference is how you use it.
entries.value: Difference shi ne yadda kai amfani da it.

entries.source: The easiest version of an AI tutor is a box that gives polished answers. That is useful sometimes, but it is not enough. A learner who only receives answers can leave with the page finished and the skill unchanged.
entries.value: Easiest version na an malamin AI shi ne a box that gives polished amsoshi. Wannan shi ne mai amfani sometimes, amma Shi ne not enough. Wani mai koyo who only receives amsoshi can leave tare da the shafi finished da the skill unchanged.

entries.source: The exam route links planning, quizzes, flashcards, spaced review, and motivation so learners do not confuse rereading with readiness.
entries.value: Exam hanya hanyoyi tsarawa, tambayoyi, katunan tunatarwa, bita da tazara, da ƙarfafa gwiwa don haka masu koyo kada a confuse rereading tare da readiness.

entries.source: The fastest route from search intent to learning action.
entries.value: Fastest hanya daga nufin bincike don aikin koyo.

entries.source: The fastest way back is to start a public learning mode, browse the mode directory, or read a guide that links into the live chat experience.
entries.value: Fastest way back shi ne don fara a na jama’a yanayin koyo, bincika the mode kundin adireshi, ko karanta a jagora that hanyoyi zuwa the kai tsaye chat experience.

entries.source: The fastest way to get value from Art Appreciation Guide is to give the AI a learning job, not just a topic. A topic says what you are interested in. A learning job says what kind of help you need.
entries.value: Fastest way don get value daga fahimtar fasaha jagora shi ne don give the AI a aikin koyo, ba kawai a batu. Wani batu says abin da kai suna interested a cikin. Wani aikin koyo says abin da kind na taimako kai buƙata.

entries.source: The fastest way to get value from Career Explorer is to give the AI a learning job, not just a topic. A topic says what you are interested in. A learning job says what kind of help you need.
entries.value: Fastest way don get value daga mai binciken sana’o’i shi ne don give the AI a aikin koyo, ba kawai a batu. Wani batu says abin da kai suna interested a cikin. Wani aikin koyo says abin da kind na taimako kai buƙata.

entries.source: The fastest way to get value from Case Study Simulator is to give the AI a learning job, not just a topic. A topic says what you are interested in. A learning job says what kind of help you need.
entries.value: Fastest way don get value daga Case karatu mai kwaikwayo shi ne don give the AI a aikin koyo, ba kawai a batu. Wani batu says abin da kai suna interested a cikin. Wani aikin koyo says abin da kind na taimako kai buƙata.
